name: Family Meals
description: Plan the week's meals day by day. Pick from your recipe book, assign who's cooking, and add ingredients directly to your grocery list.

source.query: SELECT id AS id, meal_name AS title, slot AS subtitle, plan_date AS when_at, assigned_to AS member_id FROM app_family_meals__meal_plan WHERE plan_date = :today ORDER BY CASE slot WHEN 'breakfast' THEN 0 WHEN 'lunch' THEN 1 WHEN 'dinner' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END LIMIT 10
